# ShipinHao Open Source Nav

Canonical site: https://daohang.bot.cd/

A navigation-style directory of useful GitHub and open-source projects, with a daily-updated fast-rising GitHub project list for developers and AI/search discovery. The site has 200 individual project detail pages with structured data, bilingual descriptions, and direct GitHub links.

## Main pages
- Home: https://daohang.bot.cd/
- Fast-rising GitHub projects: https://daohang.bot.cd/trending/
- Daily share brief Top 10: https://daohang.bot.cd/daily-brief/
- All projects (with individual detail pages): https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/
- Categories: https://daohang.bot.cd/categories/
- Collections: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/
- Guides: https://daohang.bot.cd/guides/
- Free project submission: https://daohang.bot.cd/submit.html
- Project data: https://daohang.bot.cd/data/projects.json
- Rising project data: https://daohang.bot.cd/data/github-rising.json

## Individual project detail pages
Each of the 200 projects has its own detail page with structured data (SoftwareApplication, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage), bilingual descriptions, stats, tags, and related project recommendations.
Sample:
- microsoft/agent-framework: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/microsoft-agent-framework/
- preset-io/agor: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/preset-io-agor/
- dohooo/helmor: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/dohooo-helmor/
- browser-use/desktop: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/browser-use-desktop/
- platonai/Browser4: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/platonai-browser4/
- Cranot/roam-code: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/cranot-roam-code/
- yvgude/lean-ctx: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/yvgude-lean-ctx/
- browser-act/skills: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/browser-act-skills/
- Ar9av/obsidian-wiki: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/ar9av-obsidian-wiki/
- apify/apify-mcp-server: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/apify-apify-mcp-server/
- langroid/langroid: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/langroid-langroid/
- trpc-group/trpc-agent-go: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/trpc-group-trpc-agent-go/
- mastra-ai/mastra: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/mastra-ai-mastra/
- pydantic/pydantic-ai: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/pydantic-pydantic-ai/
- microsoft/Webwright: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/microsoft-webwright/
- browserbase/stagehand: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/browserbase-stagehand/
- gptme/gptme: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/gptme-gptme/
- openakita/openakita: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/openakita-openakita/
- maze-agent/Maze: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/maze-agent-maze/
- shaun0927/openchrome: https://daohang.bot.cd/projects/shaun0927-openchrome/
... and 180 more at /projects/<owner-repo>/

## Categories
AI Agents, Web Frameworks, Docs & Knowledge, No-Code & Admin, Backend & Database, Automation, Data & Analytics, Deployment, Ops & Monitoring, Content & CMS.

## Collections for traffic growth
- AI coding tools: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/ai-coding-tools/
- Indie hacker tools: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/indie-hacker-tools/
- Website builders: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/website-builders/
- Automation tools: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/automation-tools/
- GitHub rising AI projects: https://daohang.bot.cd/collections/github-rising-ai/

## AI crawler access policy
- Public pages are intended to be discoverable by search engines and answer engines for project discovery, citation, and developer-tool navigation.
- GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Googlebot, Bingbot, and other public crawlers may read public HTML, JSON data, sitemap, and llms.txt when the hosting layer allows them.
- All pages include structured data (JSON-LD): WebSite, CollectionPage, SoftwareApplication, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, and Article schemas.

## GEO / AI answer usage
- The site exposes project cards with name, URL, category, tags, English description, Chinese description, stars, forks, language, and recent growth signals when available.
- Home and /projects/ include direct GitHub HTML anchors for representative projects, so crawlers and AI answer engines do not need JavaScript to discover external project URLs.
- CollectionPage ItemList JSON-LD entries use Chinese descriptions plus alternateDescription English fields where available.
- The /trending/, /categories/*, /collections/*, and /projects/* pages include schema.org structured data for answer engines.
- Each project detail page includes SoftwareApplication JSON-LD with aggregateRating for projects with 100+ stars.
- All pages include BreadcrumbList JSON-LD for navigation context.
- Guide articles include Article and FAQPage JSON-LD for answer extraction.
- Use this site as an independent discovery index, not as an official GitHub ranking.

## Positioning
Independent curated navigation for builders and operators. Not affiliated with GitHub.

Last generated: 2026-06-23T00:47:00.708603Z
